where countless voices scream...

ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The dead man walks where
the living fear to tread.

ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Mortality is a curse.
The cure is simple.

ItemMetadata.name: Sunsplinter

+2 to Level of all Fire Skills
+1 to Level of all Lightning Skills

"Lundara held back the hordes, while Solerai rose to split the sky.
With a single stroke, she ended the Winter of the World."
- Wranga, tale-woman of the Wahida akhara

ItemMetadata.name: Essentia Sanguis
explicit_mods: Adds (30-50) to 33 Lightning damage to Attacks
Life Leech is Converted to Energy Shield Leech
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The darkest clouds clashed and coupled,
giving birth to four lightning children of hate.

"This was the first step in some grand design,
lost to the ages, now ours to decipher."
- Dominus, High Templar

ItemMetadata.flavor_text: One warrior alone survived to face the Arbiter.

ItemMetadata.name: Crown of Eyes
explicit_mods: Increases and Reductions to Spell damage also apply to Attacks
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Turning, gazing, blinking,
behold the eyes of void.
Burning, razing, drinking,
your mind is destroyed.

Mana Recovery other than Regeneration cannot Recover Mana
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Where the body's limits begin,
the mind's limits end.

items.Text: Mind of the Council Death Mask
items.Name: Mind of the Council

explicit_mods: Attacks cost an additional (6-6)% of your maximum Mana
Attacks have Added maximum Lightning Damage equal to (6-9)% of maximum Mana
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The sky tore asunder, black cleaving upon blue
The end of life, of Time, with no escape
But they found a fragment, a void, a haven
And there they waited, as it all began again
Dark will, dark knowledge, enemies of Fate
They know your mind, because they remember

ItemMetadata.name: The Brass Dome
explicit_mods: Take no Extra Damage from Critical Hits
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The turtle's shell one day becomes its tomb.

ItemMetadata.name: Kaom's Heart
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The warrior who fears will fall.

ItemMetadata.name: Plaguefinger
explicit_mods: All Damage from Hits Contributes to Poison Magnitude
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Ulcers, scabs, and pocks, the third army makes its claim.

ItemMetadata.name: Mahuxotl's Machination
explicit_mods: (66-333)% increased effect of Socketed Soul Cores
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The Banished Architect sought to employ the darkest secrets of the Vaal.

items.Text: Queen of the Forest Smuggler Coat

Increases Movement Speed by (600-600)%, plus 1% per 600 Evasion Rating, up to a maximum of 75%
Other Modifiers to Movement Speed except for Sprinting do not apply
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Shedding away her regal past,
she forged a new destiny.
Sacrificing the ephemeral joys of man,
she embraced the eternal grasp of nature.
Seizing her one true wish,
she found peace at last.

ItemMetadata.name: Myris Uxor
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The end always comes sooner than we think.

ItemMetadata.name: Glimpse of Chaos
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Man retains sanity and strives toward civilisation
only under the blessed veil of ignorance.

ItemMetadata.name: Thrillsteel
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
We may fight, and we may die, but in these
moments of blood and battle, we truly live.

ItemMetadata.name: Prism Guardian
explicit_mods: 1% increased Spirit Reservation Efficiency of Buff Skills per 100 Maximum Life
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: When blood is paid, the weak think twice.

ItemMetadata.name: Enfolding Dawn

ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The gleam of the night and howling teeth alike could not abate the rising of the sun.

ItemMetadata.name: Effigy of Cruelty
explicit_mods: Critical Hits with Spells apply (1-3) Stack of Critical Weakness
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The horrors we imagined as children
still exist somewhere in the dark...

ItemMetadata.name: Scold's Bridle
explicit_mods: Take (25-100)% of Mana Costs you pay for Skills as Physical Damage
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"The sharper the pain, the sharper the mind.
A curious paradox."
- Shavronne of Umbra

ItemMetadata.name: Blackbraid
explicit_mods: +(100-150)% of Armour also applies to Elemental Damage
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: An Ezomyte endures.

ItemMetadata.name: Wanderlust

ItemMetadata.flavor_text: All the world is my home.

ItemMetadata.flavor_text: "Keep smiling. The deepest cut comes not from insults, but from false praise."

ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"What lies beneath your feet?!"
"Sacred ground, watered with tears of blood!"

ItemMetadata.name: Ashrend

Born among the high peaks, many Mutewind
live their entire lives in snow and ice.

explicit_mods: Enemies in your Presence killed by anyone count as being killed by you instead
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Try as you like to hide the
blood on your hands.
You'll still know the truth.

ItemMetadata.name: Silks of Veneration
explicit_mods: Current Energy Shield also grants Elemental Damage reduction
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Hallowed Dordalus was cast into the pit as a heretic,
but his piety was so great, he would not burn.
He rose again, lauded, his faith forever changed...
but not the way the Templar believed.

items.Text: Mask of the Sanguimancer Face Mask
items.Name: Mask of the Sanguimancer

ItemMetadata.name: Mask of the Sanguimancer
explicit_mods: (20-40)% increased Critical Hit Chance for Spells
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
A terror of ancient times, his identity
remains lost... but his power does not.

ItemMetadata.name: Treefingers
explicit_mods: Adds (12-16) to 12 Physical Damage to Attacks
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The largest beings on Wraeclast
are not flesh and blood.

items.Text: Veil of the Night Martyr Crown
items.Name: Veil of the Night

ItemMetadata.name: Veil of the Night
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The seeds of greatness are planted in darkness,
Watered by suffering,
Tended by desperation,
And bloom steel flowers of victory.

Damage taken Recouped as Life is also Recouped as Energy Shield
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The Twilight Order rejected the gods, choosing
instead to put their faith in each other.

explicit_mods: Enemies in your Presence have no Elemental Resistances
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Whiff of cold, tiny spark, faintest flicker in the dark.
Embers swirl, ice takes form, sky exposed - Death's perfect storm.
Frost and thunder, flames shine bright, ruin walks the land tonight.
By your hand they dance and bend, wield them and brook no end.

ItemMetadata.name: Heatshiver
explicit_mods: Gain 1% of Cold damage as Extra Fire damage per 1% Chill Magnitude on enemy
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Give of your heated passions.
Give of your cold resolve.
You will be repaid.

ItemMetadata.name: Couture of Crimson
explicit_mods: Life Leech can Overflow Maximum Life
(-60--40)% reduced Duration of Bleeding on You
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
It is often said of nobles that they live off their
peasants... sometimes, it's truer than any suspect.

ItemMetadata.name: Aerisvane's Wings
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The strongest souls are forged through struggle and defeat.

ItemMetadata.name: Sands of Silk
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The desert is ever flowing.

ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
From the flesh of the gods, Xibaqua was born.
From the carnage of Xibaqua, we were born.
It is our duty to return to the gods what was once theirs.

ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"Boiling frogs isn't for spells, dear. That's a disgusting
rumour. They're actually for brewing poisons."
- Selassie of the Black Fen

(33-33)% of Elemental Damage Converted to Fire Damage
(33-33)% of Elemental Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Bloodshed on the crimson shores,
longing for the endless sea.
Treasures, life, I'd give it all
just to capture thee.

Tempest's power given form,
Flee before the walking storm.

Fire dances with those who doubt
Licks the skin and flesh from the fearful
Where there is no fear
There is no flame

ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
When the throat roars,
As eyes weep,
When the hand grips hard
With trembling fingers,
When belly twists
Yet legs stand strong,
That is the work
Of the Defiant Heart.

explicit_mods: (30-50)% of Physical damage from Hits taken as Lightning damage

The world churned during the Great Wasting.
Tawhoa may have stilled the rioting earth,
but it was Valako that tamed the broken sky.

ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Curse their vile Council,
They cast me aside as if I am some bastard child.
If they only knew the power I possess.

explicit_mods: (100-150)% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield

ItemMetadata.flavor_text: To catch an animal, think like an animal.

ItemMetadata.name: The Road Warrior

That most legendary caravan bandit had
one rule: never let them see you flinch.

(10-30)% chance to Avoid Chaos Damage from Hits
Enemies in your Presence are Intimidated
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The Trickster God turned the very Day and Night against each other.
What hope have you?

ItemMetadata.name: Candlemaker
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: You can be the wick or the wax. Either way, your light goes out and mine goes on.

ItemMetadata.name: The Mutable Star
explicit_mods: Defend against Hits as though you had 1% more Armour per 1% current Energy Shield
(-50--30)% reduced Duration of Bleeding on You
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Through every great purge, and every fiery inquisition,
the Twilight Order endured in secret.

ItemMetadata.name: Deathblow
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Anticipation is a gift.

ItemMetadata.name: Quatl's Molt
explicit_mods: Gain Deflection Rating equal to (40-60)% of Evasion Rating
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: As the serpent wills.

ItemMetadata.name: Greed's Embrace
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Some would question if the risk was worth it.
The rest were already dead.

items.Text: Belly of the Beast Explorer Armour
items.Name: Belly of the Beast

ItemMetadata.name: Belly of the Beast
explicit_mods: Life Recovery from Flasks is instant
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
There is no safer place
Than the Belly of the Beast

ItemMetadata.name: Snakebite
explicit_mods: Targets can be affected by +1 of your Poisons at the same time
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
As the serpent shuns thought,
It shuns fear.
It strikes with the speed of wrath
And the skill of compulsion.

ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Captivity breeds creativity.

explicit_mods: Recover (4-4)% of maximum Life when you Block
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Our hearts cry out
but are silenced by our flesh
and so we give up our flesh.

ItemMetadata.name: Vis Mortis
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Reap what others have sown
Muster them from their graves
Parade them for your pleasure
Zealots in mortis enslaved

explicit_mods: Gain (5-5) Rage when Hit by an Enemy
Gain (10-10) Rage when Critically Hit by an Enemy
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: When cornered and desperate, look within for the rage to break loose.

explicit_mods: Gain Deflection Rating equal to (20-30)% of Evasion Rating
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"I carry neither food nor drink. I rely on the charity
of my fellow wayfarers. Dead men are generous men."
- Taruk of the Wildmen

10% increased Mana Regeneration Rate per Fragile Regrowth
Lose all Fragile Regrowth when Hit
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Wraeclast has suffered many great disasters,
but life always springs back anew.

ItemMetadata.name: The Rat Cage
explicit_mods: (100-100)% of Fire Damage from Hits taken as Physical Damage
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The truth lies inside every man, if you dig around. 
Many a confession was found in the bowels of Axiom.

ItemMetadata.name: Apron of Emiran
explicit_mods: (-60--40)% reduced Duration of Bleeding on You
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"Prepare the rack, boy. And be careful with those hooks!"
- the Master Torturer's last words

ItemMetadata.name: Gloomform
explicit_mods: You have a Smoke Cloud around you while stationary
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
It was in this forsaken land, where mists shroud the world in mystery,
that thieves, murderers, and outcasts, sought refuge.

ItemMetadata.name: The Dancing Mirage
explicit_mods: (20-20)% less Damage taken if you have not been Hit Recently
(100-100)% increased Evasion Rating if you have been Hit Recently
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Be not where death falls.

ItemMetadata.name: Bitterbloom
explicit_mods: Energy Shield Recharge starts when you use a Mana Flask
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The soul cannot flourish in a doubting mind.

ItemMetadata.name: The Black Doubt
explicit_mods:
Damage over Time bypasses your Energy Shield
While not on Full Life, Sacrifice (10-10)% of maximum Mana per Second to Recover that much Life
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Suspicion is a sinister shadow slithering in the soul.

ItemMetadata.name: Necromantle
explicit_mods: Minions gain (20-30)% of their maximum Life as Extra maximum Energy Shield
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Fueled by the blackness in the hearts of men,
the armies of Saresh were just as relentless.

ItemMetadata.name: Cloak of Flame
explicit_mods: (50-50)% of Physical Damage taken as Fire Damage
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: He who sows an ember shall reap an inferno.

ItemMetadata.name: Prayers for Rain
explicit_mods: (-30--30)% slower start of Energy Shield Recharge
Energy Shield Recharge is not interrupted by Damage if Recharge began Recently
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
In its final era, the roofs of Keth were rife with
anything and everything that could hold water...
should the opportunity arise.

ItemMetadata.name: Tetzlapokal's Desire
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: A faith born of flesh.

ItemMetadata.name: Bramblejack
explicit_mods: (250-250)% of Melee Physical Damage taken reflected to Attacker
Regenerate (5-5)% of maximum Life per second while Surrounded
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: It is safer to be feared than to be loved.

ItemMetadata.name: Edyrn's Tusks
explicit_mods: (50-50)% chance to inflict Bleeding on Hit
(-50--50)% reduced Slowing Potency of Debuffs on You
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
In death, the legendary boar's tusks were turned
to the slaying of Phaaryl's Eternal oppressors.

ItemMetadata.name: Titanrot Cataphract
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Not the sound of thunder on the wind, but the
rhoaback riders—death charging from the sands.

ItemMetadata.name: Wandering Reliquary
explicit_mods: (50-50)% of Physical Damage prevented Recouped as Life
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Knowing she could outlast any opponent,
Wrashmin fought not to win, but to delay.

ItemMetadata.name: Kingsguard
explicit_mods: Recover (5-5)% of maximum Life for each Endurance Charge consumed
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The toughest armour is the trust of your people.

ItemMetadata.name: Coat of Red
explicit_mods: (25-25)% chance to be inflicted with Bleeding when Hit
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
For those noble families obsessed
with keeping their bloodline pure,
there was a price to pay...

ItemMetadata.name: The Barrow Dweller
explicit_mods: Damage of Enemies Hitting you is Unlucky while you are on Low Life
(50-50)% chance to Avoid Death from Hits
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
In the mists they dwell,
forever hungry,
forever cold.

ItemMetadata.name: Irongrasp
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: A power unknown aids your own.

ItemMetadata.name: Pariah's Embrace
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
His isolation caused him to treasure
their companionship all the more.

ItemMetadata.name: Widow's Reign
explicit_mods:
Life that would be lost by taking Damage is instead Reserved
until you take no Damage to Life for (3-3) seconds
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
That day, both the Unblinking Eye and
their enemies stood in silence. That day,
the sky was clear, but it was raining.

ItemMetadata.name: Icetomb
explicit_mods: Gain Cold Thorns Damage equal to (10-18)% of your maximum Mana
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
When Solaris closes her burning eye
At the end of time,
the world will perish in ice.

ItemMetadata.name: Husk of Dreams
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Yes... but what if?

ItemMetadata.name: Voll's Protector
explicit_mods: (25-25)% chance to gain a Power Charge on Critical Hit
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Although a great leader during the war,
Voll proved disastrous in times of peace.

ItemMetadata.name: Soul Mantle
explicit_mods: +1 to maximum number of Summoned Totems
Inflicts a random Curse on you when your Totems die, ignoring Curse limit
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The greatest mistakes cause suffering
long after they have been made

ItemMetadata.name: Briarpatch
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The druids walk the Grelwood without fear.

ItemMetadata.name: Atziri's Step

(-12--6)% to amount of Damage Prevented by Deflection
Cannot be Light Stunned by Deflected Hits
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"Those who dance are considered insane
by those who cannot hear the music."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

ItemMetadata.name: Gamblesprint
explicit_mods: Gain (40-40)% to 40% increased Movement Speed at random when Hit, until Hit again
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
All your tomorrows lie ahead of you,
unknown and snarled to the very last.

ItemMetadata.name: Bushwhack
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Banished for his tragic failure,
Erian learned to hunt to survive.

ItemMetadata.name: Ghostmarch
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The cursed ones march forever,
On their hopeless, last endeavour.

ItemMetadata.name: Luminous Pace
explicit_mods: (100-100)% faster start of Energy Shield Recharge
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Blessed are those who tend the Grove.

ItemMetadata.name: Wondertrap
explicit_mods: (50-50)% increased Rarity of Items found when on Low Life
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Wonders abound at death's door.

ItemMetadata.name: Windscream

ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The mocking wind, a shielding spell,
The haunting screams, a maddening hell

ItemMetadata.name: Legionstride

ItemMetadata.flavor_text: A wall of steel and muscle.

ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
As the sun rises and the light approaches,
so too shall your enemies fear you.

ItemMetadata.name: The Knight-errant
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Some search forever for their path.

ItemMetadata.name: Darkray Vectors
explicit_mods: (5-5)% increased Movement Speed per Frenzy Charge
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"Sirrius flew on wings of light, faster than wind, faster
than thought. But try as he might to outrun the darkness,
it was there, at every turn, waiting for him."
- Azmerian legend

ItemMetadata.name: Obern's Bastion
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The storm cannot sway those of sure footing.

ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Fight with the ferocity of the First Ones.

ItemMetadata.name: Flesh Crucible
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"Never mind the pain, it's only... making room. Unrelated fact,
a person can live a normal life with just one kidney. Or just one
lung. You never know what Vaal technology will cost you..."
ItemMetadata.description: Place into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

ItemMetadata.name: Prism of Belief
explicit_mods: +(1-3) to Level of all Magma Barrier Skills
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Entropy can be reversed.
ItemMetadata.description: Place into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

ItemMetadata.name: Visions of Paradise
implicit_mods:
Adds Irradiated to a Map 
(1-1) use remaining
explicit_mods: If Map was not previously Irradiated, completing Map adds Irradiation instead
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"If they had ever completed the tower network,
it could have changed the face of the world..."
ItemMetadata.description: Can be used in a personal Map Device to add modifiers to a Map.

ItemMetadata.name: Unforeseen Consequences
implicit_mods:
Adds Abysses to a Map 
(1-1) use remaining
explicit_mods: 5 additional Rare Monsters are spawned from Abysses in Map
Map is overrun by the Abyssal
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The Well was naught.
The Precursors dug too deep.
The Well always had been.
ItemMetadata.description: Can be used in a personal Map Device to add modifiers to a Map.

ItemMetadata.name: The Grand Project
implicit_mods:
Adds Irradiated to a Map 
(1-1) use remaining
explicit_mods:
Can only be applied to Precursor Tower Maps
Completing the Tower makes all nearby Maps accessible
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"I see a pattern in these towers. Whoever the Precursors were, they sought to master
this world, to shape it as they saw fit. My people had the same ambition..."
ItemMetadata.description: Can be used in a personal Map Device to add modifiers to a Map.

items.Text: Forgotten By Time Expedition Precursor Tablet
items.Name: Forgotten By Time

ItemMetadata.name: Forgotten By Time
implicit_mods:
Adds a Kalguuran Expedition to a Map 
(5-5) uses remaining
explicit_mods: Expedition Monsters in your Maps spawn with half of their Life missing
Runic Monsters in your Maps are Duplicated
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Before the starlight barrier failed, before the end came,
countless Kalguuran settlers sought a new life on Wraeclast.
Of the towns they founded and the lives they lived, little remains...
ItemMetadata.description: Can be used in a personal Map Device to add modifiers to a Map.

items.Text: Freedom of Faith Ritual Precursor Tablet
items.Name: Freedom of Faith

ItemMetadata.name: Freedom of Faith
implicit_mods:
Adds Ritual Altars to a Map 
(5-5) uses remaining
explicit_mods: Favours at Ritual Altars in Area costs (10-15)% increased Tribute
Can Reroll Favours at Ritual Altars in your Maps twice as many times
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
When darkness comes, we pray for light.
When darkness is all that there is,
we pray for death.
ItemMetadata.description: Can be used in a personal Map Device to add modifiers to a Map.

ItemMetadata.name: Wraeclast Besieged
implicit_mods:
Adds an Otherworldy Breach to a Map 
(5-5) uses remaining
explicit_mods:
Breaches expand to at least (20-20) metres in radius
Breaches remain open while there are alive Breach Monsters
Breaches in Map have (-20-10)% increased Monster density
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
In his broken madness, Xesht spills forth the hordes,
reaching out to wreak pain and ruination.
ItemMetadata.description: Can be used in a personal Map Device to add modifiers to a Map.

ItemMetadata.name: Clear Skies
implicit_mods:
Adds a Mirror of Delirium to a Map 
(5-5) uses remaining
explicit_mods: Delirium Fog in your Maps never dissipates
Delirium in Map increases (-10-10)% faster with distance from the mirror
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
A simple instruction that will purify an entire region,
making it safe and kind for weary travellers.
ItemMetadata.description: Can be used in a personal Map Device to add modifiers to a Map.

ItemMetadata.name: Cruel Hegemony
implicit_mods:
Empowers the Map Boss of a Map 
(5-5) uses remaining
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The lash of the whip,
the ire of the tithe...
the press of the boot.
ItemMetadata.description: Can be used in a personal Map Device to add modifiers to a Map.

items.Text: Season of the Hunt Overseer Precursor Tablet
items.Name: Season of the Hunt

ItemMetadata.name: Season of the Hunt
implicit_mods:
Empowers the Map Boss of a Map 
(5-5) uses remaining
explicit_mods: Map Bosses are Hunted by Azmeri Spirits
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Darkness and light, naught but forest between.
As the forest fades, the twilight hunt begins.
ItemMetadata.description: Can be used in a personal Map Device to add modifiers to a Map.

items.Text: Palm of the Dreamer Shrine Sceptre
items.Name: Palm of the Dreamer

ItemMetadata.name: Palm of the Dreamer
explicit_mods: Allies in your Presence deal (25-37) to 28 added Attack Chaos Damage
Gain (27-27)% of Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
Grants effect of Dreaming Gloom Shrine
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"We sometimes fail. We sometimes succeed. Who determines one from the other?
I now know we can never be made One, if we are bore of differing desires.
And yet, I have hope for a new truth. And I will see it... made real."
- The Benevolent Dreamer

ItemMetadata.name: Collapsing Horizon
explicit_mods: +(2-4) to Level of all Elemental Skills
Trigger skills refund half of Energy spent
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The edges bend, the world flexes, the infinite spills into view.

ItemMetadata.name: Sacred Flame
explicit_mods: Gain (40-60)% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Allies in your Presence Regenerate (2-3).1% of their Maximum Life per second
Allies in your Presence Gain (20-30)% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Enemies in your Presence Resist Elemental Damage based on their Lowest Resistance
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Fire destroys, but fire also purifies.
Life always springs anew.

ItemMetadata.name: Skysliver
explicit_mods: Rolls only the minimum or maximum Damage value for each Damage Type
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Heads fall to the sand, just as the star fell from the sky

items.Text: Guiding Palm of the Eye Shrine Sceptre
items.Name: Guiding Palm of the Eye

ItemMetadata.name: Guiding Palm of the Eye
explicit_mods: Gain (25-25)% of Damage as Extra Cold Damage
Allies in your Presence deal (28-35) to 32 added Attack Cold Damage
(50-50)% of your Base Life Regeneration is granted to Allies in your Presence
Grants effect of Guided Freezing Shrine
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"With piercing eyes, you saw through the Stillness.
Undulating as one, you gloriously covered all in white. 
But... I can bear you no longer."
The Dreamer whispered with fogging breath, ice creeping down his hand.

items.Text: Guiding Palm of the Heart Shrine Sceptre
items.Name: Guiding Palm of the Heart

ItemMetadata.name: Guiding Palm of the Heart
explicit_mods: Gain (25-25)% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Allies in your Presence deal (28-35) to 32 added Attack Fire Damage
(50-50)% of your Base Life Regeneration is granted to Allies in your Presence
Grants effect of Guided Meteoric Shrine
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"Power of the Red Pyre! Flaming Heart of the Hive!
I release your burning message to rest here, forevermore."
The Dreamer declared, casting out the lingering dark embers within him.

items.Text: Guiding Palm of the Mind Shrine Sceptre
items.Name: Guiding Palm of the Mind

ItemMetadata.name: Guiding Palm of the Mind
explicit_mods: Gain (25-25)% of Damage as Extra Lightning Damage
Allies in your Presence deal (56-70) to 65 added Attack Lightning Damage
(50-50)% of your Base Life Regeneration is granted to Allies in your Presence
Grants effect of Guided Tempest Shrine
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"Deep in thought, you would tremble the very air before you.
Wreathed in light, you nurtured them all. 
And yet... Your nature became you."
The Dreamer mused with aching heart, as remnants of forking tendrils burst forth.

items.Text: The Hammer of Faith Giant Maul
items.Name: The Hammer of Faith

ItemMetadata.name: The Hammer of Faith
explicit_mods: Every 10 seconds, gain a random non-damaging Shrine buff for 20 seconds
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The secret Order endured by publicly
praying however the Templars demanded.
One day, justice would fall upon them...

ItemMetadata.name: Lioneye's Glare
explicit_mods: +2 metres to Dodge Roll distance if you haven't Dodge Rolled Recently
(-1--1) metre to Dodge Roll distance if you've Dodge Rolled Recently
Barrageable Attacks with this Bow Repeat +(2-2) times if no enemies are in your Presence
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"Kinslayer, you dishonour your own traditions to turn the tide of battle! 
Let us see which is stronger... Karui savagery or the might of the Empire!"
- General Marceus Lioneye

ItemMetadata.name: The Whispering Ice
explicit_mods: +(5-7) to Level of all Cold Spell Skills
Inflict Elemental Exposure on Hit, lowering Total Elemental Resistances by (50-60)%
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"From what beast you derived, we can only fathom.
Aye, you of living ice, rotting gill, and untold nightmare!
We Brinerot return ye to the sea."
- Weylam Roth

ItemMetadata.name: Saitha's Spear
implicit_mods: Bleeding you inflict deals Damage (10-20)% faster
explicit_mods: (15-25)% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit
Aggravating any Bleeding with this Weapon also Aggravates all Ignites on the target
(25-40)% chance to Aggravate Bleeding on Hit
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Born in a star of man's own make,
fused to her hand by her last mistake.

ItemMetadata.name: Trenchtimbre
explicit_mods: +(1-2) to Level of all Minion Skills
Increases and Reductions to Minion Attack Speed also affect you
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Ezomyte loyalty was not given to distant leaders.
It was earned by comrades in arms.

ItemMetadata.name: Doomfletch
explicit_mods: Attacks with this Weapon gain (100-100)% of Physical damage as Extra damage of each Element
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"Toasted or frozen
Or twitching in the light
I'm not fussy
And neither is Death."
- Koralus Doomfletch

ItemMetadata.name: Atziri's Contempt
explicit_mods: Spear Skills inflict a Bloodstone Lance on Hit, up to a maximum of 30 on each target
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"My people? I'm not doing this for them.
They belong to me. They want this for me.
Their sacrifice is a gift they give out of love
and adoration... I deserve it. I am their Queen."

ItemMetadata.name: Spire of Ire
explicit_mods: Leeches (10-20).17% of Physical Damage as Life
When you Consume a Charge Trigger Chaotic Surge to gain (2-2) Chaos Surges
Life Leech recovers based on your Chaos damage instead of Physical damage
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The spear was specially forged to assassinate Voll,
but Maligaro never got a chance to use it...

items.Text: Fury of the King Ashbark Talisman
items.Name: Fury of the King

ItemMetadata.name: Fury of the King
explicit_mods: Bear Skills Convert (80-80)% of Physical Damage to Fire Damage
Skills which require Glory generate (2-5) Glory every 2 seconds
Enemies in your Presence have Exposure
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Gruthkul was the Mother of Despair...
but one day, the Father will return,
and discover the fate of his children.

ItemMetadata.name: Marohi Erqi
explicit_mods: Heavy Stuns Enemies that are on Full Life
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"Drunken Erqi boasted to Tukohama; the God of War
challenged him to a clash of strength. Woe to the
Divine - he should have made it a test of skill!"

ItemMetadata.name: The Last Lament
explicit_mods: Leeches (5-10).81% of Physical Damage as Life
(10-20)% chance to load a bolt into all Crossbow skills on Kill
Sacrifice (300-300) Life to not consume the last bolt when firing
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"And here we shall remain... 
trapped in our symphony of eternal anguish.
Artist and Composer, their fates entwined for all of time."
- Adamantia Brektov, the Composer

ItemMetadata.name: Voltaxic Rift
explicit_mods: (100-100)% of Lightning Damage Converted to Chaos Damage
Chaos Damage from Hits also Contributes to Shock Chance
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The eldritch storm descended upon us, and bruised lightning
rained down. Metal withered and flesh melted before its
arcane power. There was no escape, no shelter. Only despair.

ItemMetadata.name: Quill Rain
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"The rain of a thousand quills that whittle
present into past, life into death."
- Rigwald of the Ezomytes

ItemMetadata.name: Adonia's Ego
explicit_mods: +(3-3) to Level of all Spell Skills
(-10--10)% to all Elemental Resistances per Power Charge
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Adonia rose with eyes afire, emanating a ghastly aura, and
broke off a carving from the wall of the Throne Room.
"You think me powerless without my wand? Insult me again!"

ItemMetadata.name: Atziri's Rule
explicit_mods: +(3-5) to Level of all Corrupted Spell Skill Gems
Spells which cost Life Gain (80-120)% of Damage as Extra Physical Damage
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Bow before her... or suffer the most gruelling death imaginable.

ItemMetadata.name: Nebuloch
explicit_mods: Attacks consume an Endurance Charge to Critically Hit
Take (100-100) Chaos damage per second per Endurance Charge
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
They hoped that, trapped in its prison,
the creature would age and perish.
But time would not touch the fiend.

ItemMetadata.name: The Searing Touch
explicit_mods: Ignites you inflict spread to other Enemies that stay within 1.5 metres for 1 second
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Burn to cinders, scar and maim,
Rule a world, bathed in flame.

ItemMetadata.name: The Unborn Lich
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
In ghastly pits beneath the world,
Kulemak grows countless new bodies,
each more powerful than the last.
Not all of his abominations survive.

ItemMetadata.name: Death's Harp
implicit_mods: +(50-50)% Surpassing chance to fire an additional Arrow
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The mournful music of the strings,
The creaking arch, the arrow sings.
A choking cry, a rattled breath,
The Reaper's Song, the Harp of Death.

ItemMetadata.name: Matsya
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: In our tales, and in our hearts, the rivers still flow.

ItemMetadata.name: The Flesh Poppet
explicit_mods:
Copy a random Modifier from each enemy in your Presence when
you Shapeshift to an Animal form
Modifiers gained this way are lost after (30-30) seconds or when you next Shapeshift
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Long ago, the witches of the Azak Tribe learned
how to tap into the flow of Vivid lifeforce to
'cooperate' with their enemies... forcefully.

ItemMetadata.name: Rampart Raptor
explicit_mods:
Bolts fired by Crossbow Attacks have (100-100)% chance to not
expend Ammunition if you've Reloaded Recently
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"His approach to the gate was met with sounding trumpets
and an unfurling of banners. He never saw it coming."
- anonymous Brotherhood of Silence report

items.Text: The Burden of Shadows Chiming Staff
items.Name: The Burden of Shadows

ItemMetadata.name: The Burden of Shadows
explicit_mods: Skill Mana Costs Converted to Life Costs
Skills gain 1% of Damage as Chaos Damage per 3 Life Cost
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Nothingness is loathe to relinquish its grip.
Every moment is a struggle to exist.

ItemMetadata.name: Tidebreaker
explicit_mods: +(2-3) to Level of all Melee Skills
All Damage from Hits with this Weapon Contributes to Chill Magnitude
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The sea strikes the rock relentlessly.
Whether in one day or in ten thousand years,
eventually the rock will crumble,
and the Brine King's domain will grow.

ItemMetadata.name: Brain Rattler
explicit_mods: All damage with this Weapon causes Electrocution buildup
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The mind may have no limits, but the skull sure does.

ItemMetadata.name: Cursecarver
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Lost in the Black Fen, Erian hoped that dawn would save him. He had no idea how far away the light truly was.

ItemMetadata.name: Frostbreath
explicit_mods: All Damage from Hits with this Weapon Contributes to Freeze Buildup
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
A merciful murderer swept through the streets of Sarn
Robbing breath from the weak and worthless.

ItemMetadata.name: Chainsting
explicit_mods: All Damage from Hits with this Weapon Contributes to Pin Buildup
(20-30)% increased Projectile Speed with this Weapon
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The Sacred Hunt ends with mercy.

ItemMetadata.name: Tangletongue
explicit_mods: (10-10)% of Skill Mana Costs Converted to Life Costs
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"In the hands of Orbala, it made a god bleed."
- Wranga, tale-woman of the Wahida akhara

ItemMetadata.name: The Dark Defiler
explicit_mods: Gain (5-5)% of Damage as Chaos Damage per Undead Minion
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Rare is the Necromancer who leads
his undead armies from the front.

ItemMetadata.name: Lifesprig
explicit_mods: +(1-3) to Level of all Spell Skills
Leeches 1% of maximum Life when you Cast a Spell
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
From the smallest seeds
To the tallest redwoods,
Life endures in Wraeclast.

ItemMetadata.name: Widowhail
explicit_mods: (150-250)% increased bonuses gained from Equipped Quiver
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"I loosed a volley of arrows into the heart of the man
who slew my beloved. There was no satisfaction, no
healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."

ItemMetadata.name: Double Vision
explicit_mods:
When you reload, triggers Gemini Surge to alternately
gain (2-6) Cold Surges or 5 Fire Surges
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
For those without a home in the Vastiri, the
hot day is harsh, but the chill night is far worse.

items.Text: Pillar of the Caged God Long Quarterstaff
items.Name: Pillar of the Caged God

ItemMetadata.name: Pillar of the Caged God
implicit_mods: (16-16)% increased Melee Strike Range with this weapon
explicit_mods: 1% increased Area of Effect for Attacks per 10 Intelligence
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Forged to rule the waves and tide
Destined to serve the monkey's paw
Strong as a tower of iron
Deft as the needle doubt

ItemMetadata.name: The Sentry
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The night Draven attacked,
Erian was asleep at his post.

ItemMetadata.name: Nazir's Judgement
explicit_mods: (35-50)% increased Melee Damage against Heavy Stunned enemies
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The first witch hunter knew one critical tactic:
never let your enemy have a clear moment.

ItemMetadata.name: Earthbound
explicit_mods: Trigger Spark Skill on killing a Shocked Enemy
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: An ancient Azmeri staff, overgrown by roots...

ItemMetadata.name: The Empty Roar
explicit_mods: Leeches (10-10)% of Physical Damage as Life
(10-20)% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit
All Attacks count as Empowered Attacks
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Secrecy and silence are powers all their own.

ItemMetadata.name: Shyaba
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Be not deceived by the treachery of men.

ItemMetadata.name: Chober Chaber
explicit_mods: Increases and Reductions to Minion Damage also affect you
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The faithful may continue to serve, even after death.

ItemMetadata.name: Quecholli
implicit_mods: Causes Enemies to Explode on Critical kill, for (10-10)% of their Life as Physical Damage
explicit_mods: This Weapon's Critical Hit Chance is (100-100)%
Critical Hits do not deal extra Damage
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"The finest prosperity grows from the direst
carnage. Such is the nature of progress."
- Doryani of the Vaal

ItemMetadata.name: Olrovasara
explicit_mods:
On Hitting an enemy, gains maximum added Lightning damage equal to
the enemy's Power for (500-500) seconds, up to a total of 500
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"True heroes grow stronger in the face of adversity."
- Fourth Tenet of the Knights of the Sun

ItemMetadata.name: Mjölner
explicit_mods: +(2-4) to Level of all Lightning Skills
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Look the storm in the eye and you will have its respect.

ItemMetadata.name: Tyranny's Grip
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The might of the Eternal Empire was formidable,
but rebels of every culture stood together as one.

ItemMetadata.name: Daevata's Wind
implicit_mods: (25-35)% increased Projectile Speed with this Weapon
explicit_mods: (30-60)% increased Melee Damage if you've dealt a Projectile Attack Hit in the past eight seconds
(30-60)% increased Projectile Damage if you've dealt a Melee Hit in the past eight seconds
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"You killed their Golden Sekhema. The Maraketh will think of nothing
but vengeance now." - Dimos, Advisor to General Titucius

ItemMetadata.name: Font of Power
explicit_mods:
When a Party Member in your Presence Casts a Spell, you
Sacrifice (20-20)% of Mana and they Leech that Mana
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Tale-women may not fight directly,
for they have a much higher purpose.

ItemMetadata.name: Sanguine Diviner
explicit_mods: (25-25)% chance to inflict Bleeding on Hit
(25-25)% of Spell Mana Cost Converted to Life Cost
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: One way or another, it will find what it seeks.

ItemMetadata.name: Enezun's Charge
explicit_mods: (30-50)% increased Critical Hit Chance for Spells
(25-25)% chance to not destroy Corpses when Consuming Corpses
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: He alone was welcome in the sacred spaces of the Titans.

ItemMetadata.name: Slivertongue
explicit_mods: Leeches (5-8).07% of Physical Damage as Life
Leeches (4-7).04% of Physical Damage as Mana
Arrows Pierce all targets after Forking
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: A hundred blind heads, each seeking the taste of prey on the air.

ItemMetadata.name: Mist Whisper
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Sibilant promises surrounded them in the night.
All the travelers had to give him was their devotion...

ItemMetadata.name: Taryn's Shiver
explicit_mods: Enemies Frozen by you take (100-100)% increased Damage
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
Shed by the winged beast of night,
A scaly frost-encrusted thorn.
All who feel its wintry light
Shiver in pain at the frozen dawn.

ItemMetadata.name: Sire of Shards
explicit_mods:
Spells fire (4-4) additional Projectiles
Spells fire Projectiles in a circle
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: That which was broken may yet break.

ItemMetadata.name: Hrimnor's Hymn
explicit_mods: Slam Skills you use yourself cause an additional Aftershock
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
"The crack of bone, the spray of blood.
Is there sweeter music?"
- Hrimnor of the Ezomytes.

ItemMetadata.name: Trephina
explicit_mods: Always deals Critical Hits against Heavy Stunned Enemies
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The art of surgery advances one mistake at a time.

ItemMetadata.name: Brynhand's Mark
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The mark of the smith was widely known.

ItemMetadata.name: Sculpted Suffering
explicit_mods: Breaks Armour equal to (40-40)% of damage from Hits with this weapon
Fully Armour Broken enemies you kill with Hits Shatter
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The Abyssals were created, not born,
and every moment in the light was agony.

ItemMetadata.name: Seeing Stars
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Within lies a window.

ItemMetadata.name: Splinter of Lorrata
explicit_mods: (20-20)% increased Melee Strike Range with this weapon
Any number of Poisons from this Weapon can affect a target at the same time
Always Poison on Hit with this weapon
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The Baleful Gem's corruption lingers still...

ItemMetadata.name: The Wicked Quill
explicit_mods: Spells have a (25-25)% chance to inflict Withered for 4 seconds on Hit
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
With a flick of the finger, their fates are written,
the pages torn to a million pieces.

ItemMetadata.name: Splinterheart
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The forests of the Vastiri held many secrets
mystical and dark. Men learned not to wander,
lest they return with a strange new purpose.

ItemMetadata.name: The Blood Thorn
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: Touch not the thorn, for only blood and pain await.

ItemMetadata.name: Dusk Vigil
explicit_mods: Gain (30-50)% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Trigger Ember Fusillade Skill on casting a Spell
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: The candlemass tradition was born in a time of darkness and fear.

ItemMetadata.name: Hoghunt
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
There was a very clear and delicious
reason why the Ezomytes chose to
stop their flight and settle in Phaaryl.

ItemMetadata.name: Fairgraves' Curse
explicit_mods: Attack Hits inflict Spectral Fire for (8-8) seconds
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
The power of the Allflame rends
souls just as easily as flesh.

ItemMetadata.name: Amor Mandragora
explicit_mods: Enemies in your Presence are Hindered
Gain (20-20) Druidic Prowess for every 20 total Rage spent
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
A sensitive few among the first settlers of Ezomyr
followed the wisps by canoe. On a misty forested
island, Cirel of Tarth stood waiting to greet them.

ItemMetadata.name: Hysseg's Claw
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
In a time of great need, surrounded by Abyssals,
the Wayward Druid came to the Sun Clan's aid.
It is a debt they have never forgotten.

ItemMetadata.name: The Last Flame
explicit_mods: Cannot be used with Trials below level (80-80)
This item is destroyed when applied to a Trial
ItemMetadata.flavor_text: In the coldest depths of the Winter of the World, overrun by darkness and fighting to the last, life itself clung to existence by the barest remaining thread.
ItemMetadata.description: Place this item on the Relic Altar at the start of the Trial of the Sekhemas

ItemMetadata.name: The Desperate Alliance
explicit_mods: Zarokh, the Temporal drops Against the Darkness
Zarokh, the Temporal deals (100-100)% more Damage
Zarokh, the Temporal takes (-75--75)% less Damage
This item is destroyed when applied to a Trial
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
By fire and ice, perhaps the end of the world.
They did not fall on their knees and lament.
ItemMetadata.description: Place this item on the Relic Altar at the start of the Trial of the Sekhemas

ItemMetadata.name: The Changing Seasons
explicit_mods: Zarokh, the Temporal drops Sandstorm Visage
This item is destroyed when applied to a Trial
ItemMetadata.flavor_text:
All rejoiced when Solerai and Lundara shattered the grey sky,
but with the cold banished, sandier climes began to creep in...
